steps.t: Dáin can be found just outside Muru Azog at Azanulbizar. After overcoming Azog's forces at Durin's Stone, Náin Orcsfoe and the Iron-folk have begun th…
Náin can be found outside the gates of Khazad-dûm at Muru Azog. Náin Orcsfoe has driven off the coward Bolg, leaving Azog to face the Haban’akkâ. You …
Dáin can be found outside the East-gate of Khazad-dûm. Dáin has slain Azog. You should talk to Dáin.
Dáin can be found outside the East-gate of Khazad-dûm. After entering Khazad-dûm, Dáin has returned deeply troubled. You should talk to Dáin.
